---
title: "ENVS 193DS Homework 03"
author: "Sophie Pardehpoosh"
description: "Homework 3 for ENVS 193 DS"
date: 2026-02-10
categories: [R, Data Analysis]
---

This homework demonstrates my knowledge of doing statistical tests to determine the strength of relationships between variables, as well as revisiting my "personal data project". For my personal data project, I aimed to investigate whether I read more on school days vs non school days. 

<iframe 
src="../projects_blog/ENVS-193DS_homework-03_copy/code/homework_03.html"
width="100%" 
height="900px"
style="border:none;">
</iframe>
